title: acrostichum lanceolatum
intro: Acrostichum lanceolatum, also known as the giant water fern, is a tropical aquatic fern native to the Americas, characterized by its large, lance-shaped fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acrostichum lanceolatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Acrostichum lanceolatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
